name: MBI Administradora General De Fondo - MBI Deuda Alternativa Fondo De Inversion
summary: MBI Administradora General De Fondo - MBI Deuda Alternativa Fondo De Inversion invests in alternative debt instruments. MBI Administradora General De Fondo manages the fund. The fund aims to generate returns through investments in a diversified portfolio of non-traditional debt assets.
